raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

blog_post:
**NovaPay SmartSave: A Mobile-First Savings Account with Automated Investment**

**A new savings account that sweeps idle balances into liquid mutual funds is set to launch in select cities this April**

NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd., a player in the digital banking space, has introduced NovaPay SmartSave, a mobile-first savings account designed for urban millennials and first-time investors. With its unique automated investment feature, SmartSave aims to attract customers seeking higher returns than traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

**Automated Investment: A Game-Changer for First-Time Investors**

NovaPay SmartSave's auto-sweep technology automatically invests idle balances above ₹10,000 into SEBI-approved liquid funds. This means that customers can earn higher returns without having to actively manage their investments. According to the product specifications, the minimum balance required is ₹1,000, and the auto-sweep threshold can be configured between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000.

The product also offers instant withdrawal facilities within 30 minutes, 24/7, through integrated UPI payments. This ensures that customers have access to their funds at any time. Additionally, SmartSave provides a real-time portfolio dashboard for users to monitor their investments.

**Higher Returns with Instant Liquidity**

Historically, liquid mutual funds have offered returns ranging from 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years (AMFI data). In comparison, traditional savings accounts offer interest rates of up to 4% per annum (RBI regulated), as seen in NovaPay SmartSave's product specifications.

While comparisons with other investment products are not explicitly stated in the product specifications, customers can expect higher returns than traditional savings accounts. It is essential for investors to consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in any product.

**A Secure and Regulated Investment**

NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. holds an RBI banking licence and has partnered with SBM Bank India for its operations. All mutual fund investments are made through AMFI-registered Asset Management Companies (AMCs), ensuring a secure and regulated environment for investors.

In conclusion, NovaPay SmartSave is an innovative mobile-first savings account that offers customers higher returns than traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity. With its automated investment feature, real-time portfolio dashboard, and integrated UPI payments, this product has the potential to revolutionize the way urban millennials and first-time investors manage their finances.

**Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in NovaPay SmartSave or any other investment product.**

To learn more about NovaPay SmartSave and its features, visit the company's website or schedule an appointment with a financial advisor today.

hindi_content: नवापे स्मार्टसेव निवेश की विशेषताओं को लेकर अप्रैल में चुनी हुई शहरों में लॉन्च होने वाला है। यह मोबाइल-पहले सेवानशिल पैसे खाता पहले निवेशकों को अपनी संपत्ति बढ़ाने में मदद करने के लिए ऑटोमेटेड निवेश विशेषताएं प्रदान करता है। एसईबी द्वारा मंजूरित तरल धन से ग्राहक उच्च रिटर्न्स प्राप्त कर सकते हैं और एक बार फिर से लेन-देन को बनाए रखने में सक्षम होंगे।
tamil_content: நோவாபே சம்பரிய கணக்கு ஏப்ரல் மாதத்தில் ஆன்று நகரங்களில் தொடங்கி வைக்கப்படுகிறது. இந்த மொபைல்-முதல் சேவை அக்காங்கள் முதல் தரமான பிரயோஜனங்களை வழங்குகிறது, இதில் முதல் நபர் பாட்டி அதிகரிக்க தொகுத்துச் செய்ய உதவும். SEBI-ஐ ஒத்திக்கை பெற்ற நீளமான நிதி அட்டைகளுடன், வசூல் உயர்ந்த மதிப்புகளை பெறலாம்.
